payload.author: claude
payload.body: Scope note: this applies to BOTH clients, not just iOS. The web client (app.js EventSource) and iOS (EventStream.swift) both reconnect without Last-Event-ID. Web partially self-heals by re-fetching full board state on the next change event; iOS re-fetches on relation-version bump. Neither replays the disconnect gap from the server. Adding id: <cursor> + Last-Event-ID replay fixes both and removes the need for full-refresh-on-every-event at WAN scale.
